summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json (a metadata/state tracking file) and adds no source code files. None of the four requirements (REQ-49, REQ-50, REQ-51, REQ-52) are implemented — no TSX, CSS, SVG, or asset files were added or modified. All acceptance criteria across all four requirements are unmet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redesign all game visuals to blend dark anime, pixel art, and sumi-e ink brush styles across all game screens including LoginPage, StarterSelection, Battle, GameHome, StoryCampaign, GymBattles, PokemonRoster, GameLore, and TrainerProfile.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend source files (TSX, CSS, or assets) were modified or added. The diff only touches project_state.json with no visual changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update NinjaBattleSprite.tsx and AnimatedPokemon.tsx with pixel-art rendering (image-rendering: pixelated), step-based idle animations, anime attack motion trails, and element-specific aura glows for all 6 monsters.
missing_requirements.reason: Neither NinjaBattleSprite.tsx nor AnimatedPokemon.tsx nor any CSS/style files were modified or added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add brushstroke/ink-style decorative borders, SVG dividers, and Bangers font ink-texture headers to GameLore.tsx, StoryCampaign.tsx, GymBattles.tsx, and GameHome.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: None of the listed TSX files or any SVG/CSS assets were modified or added in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update Battle.tsx with 6 element-specific multi-layer anime battle backgrounds, atmospheric particle effects (embers, mist, leaves, lightning, shadow orbs, dust), and speed-line overlays during attacks.
